segments.text: Listen,
O coastlands, to Me, And take heed, you peoples from afar! The Lord has called Me from the womb; From the matrix of My mother He has made mention of My name.
segments.speaker: Servant of the Lord

segments.text: And He has made My mouth like a sharp sword; In the shadow of His hand He has hidden Me, And made Me a polished shaft; In His quiver He has hidden Me.
segments.speaker: Servant of the Lord

segments.text: And He said to me,
You are My servant, O Israel, In whom I will be glorified.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I have labored in vain, I have spent my strength for nothing and in vain; Yet surely my just reward is with the Lord, And my work with my God.
segments.speaker: Servant of the Lord

segments.text: And now the Lord says,
Who formed Me from the womb to be His Servant, To bring Jacob back to Him, So that Israel is gathered to Him (For I shall be glorious in the eyes of the Lord, And My God shall be My strength)
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: It is too small a thing that You should be My Servant To raise up the tribes of Jacob, And to restore the preserved ones of Israel; I will also give You as a light to the Gentiles, That You should be My salvation to the ends of the earth.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Thus says the Lord, The Redeemer of Israel, their Holy One,

To Him whom man despises, To Him whom the nation abhors, To the Servant of rulers: Kings shall see and arise, Princes also shall worship, Because of the Lord who is faithful, The Holy One of Israel; And He has chosen You.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: In an acceptable time I have heard You, And in the day of salvation I have helped You; I will preserve You and give You As a covenant to the people, To restore the earth, To cause them to inherit the desolate heritages;
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: That You may say to the prisoners, 'Go forth,' To those who are in darkness, 'Show yourselves.' They shall feed along the roads, And their pastures shall be on all desolate heights.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: They shall neither hunger nor thirst, Neither heat nor sun shall strike them; For He who has mercy on them will lead them, Even by the springs of water He will guide them.
I will make each of My mountains a road, And My highways shall be elevated.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Surely these shall come from afar; Look! Those from the north and the west, And these from the land of Sinim.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Sing, O heavens! Be joyful, O earth! And break out in singing, O mountains!
For the Lord has comforted His people, And will have mercy on His afflicted.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The Lord has forsaken me, And my Lord has forgotten me.
segments.speaker: Zion

segments.text: Can a woman forget her nursing child, And not have compassion on the son of her womb? Surely they may forget, Yet I will not forget you.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: See, I have inscribed you on the palms of My hands; Your walls are continually before Me.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Your sons shall make haste; Your destroyers and those who laid you waste Shall go away from you.
Lift up your eyes, look around and see; All these gather together and come to you.
As I live, You shall surely clothe yourselves with them all as an ornament, And bind them on you as a bride does.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: For your waste and desolate places, And the land of your destruction, Will even now be too small for the inhabitants; And those who swallowed you up will be far away.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The place is too small for me; Give me a place where I may dwell.
segments.speaker: Children of Zion

segments.text: Who has begotten these for me, Since I have lost my children and am desolate, A captive, and wandering to and fro? And who has brought these up? There I was, left alone; But these, where were they?
segments.speaker: Zion

segments.text: Behold, I will lift My hand in an oath to the nations, And set up My standard for the peoples; They shall bring your sons in their arms, And your daughters shall be carried on their shoulders;
segments.speaker: The Lord God

segments.text: Kings shall be your foster fathers, And their queens your nursing mothers; They shall bow down to you with their faces to the earth, And lick up the dust of your feet. Then you will know that I am the Lord, For they shall not be ashamed who wait for Me.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Shall the prey be taken from the mighty, Or the captives of the righteous be delivered?
Even the captives of the mighty shall be taken away, And the prey of the terrible be delivered; For I will contend with him who contends with you, And I will save your children.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: I will feed those who oppress you with their own flesh, And they shall be drunk with their own blood as with sweet wine. All flesh shall know That I, the Lord, am your Savior, And your Redeemer, the Mighty One of Jacob.
segments.speaker: The Lord
